title: frangula glaberrima
intro: Frangula glaberrima, also known as the Buckthorn or False Buckthorn, is a plant species in the Rhamnaceae family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its astringent, laxative, and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as treating constipation, diarrhea, and digestive issues, as well as reducing inflammation and improving skin conditions. Frangula glaberrima can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or powder for medicinal use, although its preparations and dosages should be carefully researched and consulted with a healthcare professional.
